stt.heardError: Maswabi, ga se ka kgona go go kwa. Hle leka gape.
stt.micAccessError: Ga a kgone go fihlelela maekrofouno. Lekola ditumelelo.

error.loadFailed: E paletšwe ke go laetša avatar: {{error}} .
error.passwordRequired: Phasewete e nyakegago bakeng sa faele ya .ania yeo e šitišitšwego
error.noSource: Ga go na mothopo wa avatar wo o filwego (avatarUrl goba avatarData) .

greetings.0: Thobela! Nka go thuša bjang lehono?
greetings.1: Thobela! Le amogetšwe! Nka go direla eng?
greetings.2: Dumela moo! Ke thabile kudu go bolela le wena!
greetings.3: Thobela! Ke mo go thuša. O hloka eng?
greetings.4: Thobela! Le kae? Nka ba le mohola bjang?
